privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated supply chain data injected by setup_task.sh. The expected total demand of 3400 units was successfully verified by summing the demand values for the five seeded warehouses (WA, IL, GA, CO, FL). The required output file paths and transportation cost ($0.02 per km) accurately match the task instructions and the explicit logic implemented in verifier.py.
